'''âth-m-h-ch''' ('''kathamhechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:oracle|oracle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-m-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oracle|oracle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-m-h-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kathamhechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithamhechoko|thithamhechoko]] || [[word:jithamhechoko|jithamhechoko]] || [[word:shithamhechoko|shithamhechoko]] || [[word:kithamhechoko|kithamhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthamhechoko|thuthuthamhechoko]] || [[word:jujuthamhechoko|jujuthamhechoko]] || [[word:shushuthamhechoko|shushuthamhechoko]] || [[word:kukuthamhechoko|kukuthamhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthamhechoko|thuthamhechoko]] || [[word:juthamhechoko|juthamhechoko]] || [[word:shuthamhechoko|shuthamhechoko]] || [[word:kuthamhechoko|kuthamhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthamhechoko|thuthamhechoko]] || [[word:juthamhechoko|juthamhechoko]] || [[word:shuthamhechoko|shuthamhechoko]] || [[word:kuthamhechoko|kuthamhechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethamhechoko|thethamhechoko]] || [[word:jethamhechoko|jethamhechoko]] || [[word:shethamhechoko|shethamhechoko]] || [[word:kethamhechoko|kethamhechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothamhechoko|thothothamhechoko]] || [[word:jojothamhechoko|jojothamhechoko]] || [[word:shoshothamhechoko|shoshothamhechoko]] || [[word:kokothamhechoko|kokothamhechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothamhechoko|thothamhechoko]] || [[word:jothamhechoko|jothamhechoko]] || [[word:shothamhechoko|shothamhechoko]] || [[word:kothamhechoko|kothamhechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothamhechoko|thothamhechoko]] || [[word:jothamhechoko|jothamhechoko]] || [[word:shothamhechoko|shothamhechoko]] || [[word:kothamhechoko|kothamhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthamhechoko|thĂŠthamhechoko]] || [[word:jĂŠthamhechoko|jĂŠthamhechoko]] || [[word:shĂŠthamhechoko|shĂŠthamhechoko]] || [[word:kĂŠthamhechoko|kĂŠthamhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathamhechoko|thathathamhechoko]] || [[word:jajathamhechoko|jajathamhechoko]] || [[word:shashathamhechoko|shashathamhechoko]] || [[word:kakathamhechoko|kakathamhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathamhechoko|thathamhechoko]] || [[word:jathamhechoko|jathamhechoko]] || [[word:shathamhechoko|shathamhechoko]] || [[word:kathamhechoko|kathamhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathamhechoko|thathamhechoko]] || [[word:jathamhechoko|jathamhechoko]] || [[word:shathamhechoko|shathamhechoko]] || [[word:kathamhechoko|kathamhechoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathamhechithi|shathamhechithi]] || [[word:shathamhechiji|shathamhechiji]] || [[word:shathamhechishi|shathamhechishi]] || [[word:shathamhechiki|shathamhechiki]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]]
|-

|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]] || [[word:shathamhechĂŻf|shathamhechĂŻf]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathamhechatha|shathamhechatha]] || [[word:shathamhechaja|shathamhechaja]] || [[word:shathamhechasha|shathamhechasha]] || [[word:shathamhechaka|shathamhechaka]]
|-

|}
